identity_baseline: A massive, bloodthirsty horde of ten thousand warriors.
physical_build: Large-scale bipedal group; individual mass is unspecified but collective scale is massive.
stable_visual_summary: A massive, bloodthirsty horde consisting of ten thousand bipedal warriors. They possess a macabre aesthetic defined by tribal warrior attire that is heavily decorated with human remains. The group functions as a large-scale collective entity.
costume_signature: Tribal warrior attire heavily decorated with human remains.
continuity_constraints: Must be depicted as a massive group (ten thousand) rather than isolated individuals.
Costume must maintain the macabre, bone/remains-heavy aesthetic.
unresolved_ambiguities: Specific individual physical dimensions of single warriors.
Exact nature of the "macabre aesthetic" beyond human remains.
